sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if left target was collected
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Objects:")
for n in seg:
    if n['id'] not in [0, 11]:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check pink bar
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'P':
        print(f"\nPink bar: pixels={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] <= 5:
        print(f"Charcoal on bar: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
